testcase.name: testTopicIdStrategyFindLatest
testAvroUnionWithSpecificReader
testEvolveAvroApicurioReusingClient
testEvolveAvroApicurio
testTopicRecordIdStrategydFindLatest
testAvroConfluentForMultipleTopics

testcase.system-out:
